title: Bump github.com/prometheus/client_golang to v1.11.1
body:
Resolves: CVE-2022-21698

Signed-off-by: Lokesh Mandvekar <lsm5@fedoraproject.org>

v1.11.1 was released over a month ago, but still hasn't been picked up by dependabot. That's why the manual PR.

@mtrmac @vrothberg @rhatdan PTAL.

comments.body: Looking at https://docs.github.com/en/code-security/dependabot/dependabot-version-updates/configuration-options-for-the-dependabot.yml-file#allow , Dependabot doesn’t check indirect dependencies.

@mtrmac commit message updated. Btw, my analysis is limited to running GoReferrers and vgrep. I wasn't able to find anything depending on the func in question outside of prometheus itself.

Let's wait to hear from @vrothberg @rhatdan if you prefer.
Thanks. Feel free to merge after tests pass.
@mtrmac worth cutting a new release? or else I could patch the rpm to resolve the fedora cve bugs.

> @mtrmac worth cutting a new release?

Let’s: #1606 .
